title: mikania scandens
intro: Mikania scandens, also known as the climbing hemp vine or quinine vine, is a tropical plant native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimalarial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Mikania scandens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various ailments such as malaria, asthma, and digestive issues. Mikania scandens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been used in herbal supplements to support overall well-being.
